# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- User prefers clean, maintainable, performant code and wants to avoid spaghetti/redundant implementations.
- User prefers no backward-compatibility/legacy migration code and wants non-redundant implementations.
- User prefers using x:Uid-based localized strings in XAML instead of hardcoded text/content values.
- Project is strict unpackaged-only and should not include any MSIX-related support or configuration.
